creator: samemari@gmail.com
text:
The issue repeatable with ru_RU.UTF-8 locale too

mari@mari-laptop~[140]13:21>uname -v
FreeBSD 8.0-STABLE #1: Thu May 13 12:32:58 EEST 2010
root@mari-laptop.metrocom.net.ua:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/LAPTOP

mari@mari-laptop~[141]13:21>locale
LANG=ru_RU.UTF-8
LC_CTYPE="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_COLLATE="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_TIME="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_NUMERIC="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_MONETARY="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_MESSAGES="ru_RU.UTF-8"
LC_ALL=

with patch all works fine, thanks

--
Marina S. Uzhentseva
UM551-RIPE
